title: R3BIRTH on the Stage Wings
detail_text: <:th_ch0210/>Our live concert is finally about to begin!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0211/>Yay! I’ve been looking forward to this day for a long time! I can’t wait to get on stage! How about you, Mia?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0212/>Yeah. I can’t wait for everyone to hear our music.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>We did practice a lot together after all. I can’t wait to sing too.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0211/>How about we sing for a bit right now? My body is just itching to sing!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0212/>What!? Didn’t we agree to not do that?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>That’s right. Lanzhu, it’ll feel even better if you save it for when we’re on stage.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0211/>Okay, sure! Plus, it’s also more fun to sing in front of everyone! 𝅘𝅥𝅮<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0212/>...Shioriko, you’ve leveled up the way you deal with Lanzhu.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>Fufu, what do you mean? Come on, everyone is waiting for us. Let’s give it all we’ve got into today’s performance!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0000/>Translated by SIFAStheatre and Idol Story<:dt_line_end/>
